evaluated_branch_synthetic_check.reason: Bulk-creating 30 synthetic TravelPriceObservation rows was blocked by this session's permission classifier (destructive/bulk-write guard) when attempted for re-verification. This repo's convention is real data only — no seeded/fabricated content in the dev DB outside explicit, cited seed commands (see memory 'Production parity only').
evaluated_branch_synthetic_check.original_claim_from_implementation_repor: 30 synthetic cab observations were temporarily injected, producing MAE≈32.6, WAPE≈0.041, p25-p75 coverage=0.4 (close to the ~0.5 statistically expected for a p25-p75 band by construction) — then deleted along with all other test/synthetic rows before the original session finished.
evaluated_branch_synthetic_check.code_review_confirms_math_is_real: evaluate_price_estimators.py (read in full for this evidence pass) computes MAE/median-AE/WAPE/pinball loss/coverage via straightforward statistics.mean/median and manual pinball-loss formulas over an 80/20 date-ordered holdout split — no stubbed or hardcoded metric values; the 'evaluated' branch is genuine code, just not re-exercised with synthetic volume in this pass.
